creator: core.dumped.sm@gmail.com
text:
The error is reproducible without option "Build and/or install documentation":
# cat /var/db/ports/net-im_licq-icq/options 
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for licq-icq-1.8.2
_OPTIONS_READ=licq-icq-1.8.2
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DOCS

All is well when:
$ cat /var/db/ports/net-im_licq-icq/options 
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for licq-icq-1.8.2
_OPTIONS_READ=licq-icq-1.8.2
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
